title: `podman images --format json` doesn't pretty print anymore
body:
```
libpod (master) $ /usr/bin/podman version
Version:            1.9.3
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.14.2
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64

libpod (master) $ /usr/bin/podman images --format json
[
    {
        "ID": "1c35c441208254cb7c3844ba95a96485388cef9ccc0646d562c7fc026e04c807",
        "Names": [
            "docker.io/library/busybox:latest"
        ],
        "Created": "2 weeks ago",
        "Digest": "sha256:95cf004f559831017cdf4628aaf1bb30133677be8702a8c5f2994629f637a209",
        "Digests": [
            "sha256:95cf004f559831017cdf4628aaf1bb30133677be8702a8c5f2994629f637a209",
            "sha256:fd4a8673d0344c3a7f427fe4440d4b8dfd4fa59cfabbd9098f9eb0cb4ba905d0"
        ],
        "CreatedAt": "2020-06-02T21:19:57.279412246Z",
        "Size": 1441812,
        "ReadOnly": false,
        "History": []
    }
]

libpod (master) $ ./bin/podman version
Version:      2.0.0-dev
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.3
Git Commit:   5ec29f8d4e79500915ec79824d9eb21630205f3f
Built:        Fri Jun 19 15:05:34 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

libpod (master) $ ./bin/podman images --format json
[{"Id":"1c35c441208254cb7c3844ba95a96485388cef9ccc0646d562c7fc026e04c807","Size":1441812,"Names":["docker.io/library/busybox:latest"],"Di
gest":"sha256:95cf004f559831017cdf4628aaf1bb30133677be8702a8c5f2994629f637a209","Digests":["sha256:95cf004f559831017cdf4628aaf1bb30133677
be8702a8c5f2994629f637a209","sha256:fd4a8673d0344c3a7f427fe4440d4b8dfd4fa59cfabbd9098f9eb0cb4ba905d0"],"Created":"2 weeks ago","CreatedAt
":"2020-06-02T21:19:57.279412246Z"}]
```
